sampleTexts.GEN.1.1: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
sampleTexts.JHN.3.16: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in him should not perish, but have everlasting life.
sampleTexts.PSA.23.1: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.
sampleTexts.REV.22.21: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
